# Summary

Describe the intent and scope of this change.

## Checklist

- [ ] Lint and tests pass locally
- [ ] Routing gates are preserved (`workspaceAllowed`, `retrievalAllowed`, `legalBasisAllowed`, `webSearchAllowed`)
- [ ] Jurisdiction conflict handling is unchanged or explicitly updated
- [ ] Citations are vetted (no unvetted citations in public `workspace.legalBasis`)
- [ ] Security impact reviewed (secrets, auth headers, sensitive logs)
- [ ] Documentation updated when behavior changed
